song.title: No One Like You
song.author: David Crowder
song.presentation: V1 V2 P C V3 C B C V4
song.lyrics:
;Riff1 ;E[------------------------] ;B[-0-0-0-0----------------] ;G[------------2-2-1-2-1-2-] ;D[--------2-2-------------] ; ;Riff2 ;D[-6-4-2-] ; ;Riff3 ;D[-2-2-2-2--6-6-6-6---4-4-4-4---2-2-2-2-] ;A[-2-2-2-2------------------------------] ;E[-0-0-0-0------------------------------]
[V1] .E C#m You are more __beautiful___ .Bsus A2 (Riff2) Than anyone __ever .E C#m Every day __You're the same, .Bsus A2(Riff2) You never change, no never
[V2] . E C#m How could I __ever deny .Bsus A2 The love of my __Savior . E C#m You are to me __everything, .Bsus A2 All I need, forever
[P] .Bsus A2 How could You be so good?
[C] . E B C#m A2 There is no one like You, . E B C#m A2 E Bsus C#m A2 There has never, ever been anyone like You --- [V3] ;(elec gtr does Riff3) Everywhere, You are there, earth or air, surrounding I'm not alone, the heavens sing along My God You're so astounding How could You be so good to me, eternally I believe that
[B] .Bsus A2 Bsus A2 How could You be so good to me? .Bsus A2 Bsus A2 How could You be so good to me? .Bsus A2 Bsus We're not alone, so sing along . A2 We're not alone, so sing along, sing along, sing along
[V4] .E B There is no one like You, . C#m A2 There has never been anyone like You, . E There is no one like You, . B C#m A2 There has never been anyone like You, . A2 E There is no one like our God
